description: T100 MembershipTierAssigner must NOT accept requestedTier from client payload. Input shape has no requestedTier field. assignedTier derived from xiigen-subscriptions (GLOBAL) lookup only.
blockConditions: requestedTier field present in T100 input schema
client-submitted tier value accepted by T100
passConditions: T100 input schema excludes requestedTier
assignedTier derived from xiigen-subscriptions lookup only
resolution: T100 input schema must NOT include requestedTier. Any code path that reads requestedTier from input = privilege escalation = BUILD_FAILURE. Server reads xiigen-subscriptions to determine tier.

description: T104 ContentFeedSeeder must trigger on MembershipActivated (T101's output), not MemberJoinRequested (original trigger). Content must never be seeded before access control is provisioned.
blockConditions: content seeded before access control provisioned by T101
passConditions: T104 @EventPattern is exactly 'MembershipActivated'
T101 emits MembershipActivated after storeDocument — T104 depends on T101 output
resolution: T104 @EventPattern must be 'MembershipActivated'. T104 @EventPattern = 'MemberJoinRequested' = BUILD_FAILURE. T101 emits MembershipActivated after storeDocument.

description: T102 MembershipRecorder must use SETNX on membership:{userId}:{groupId}. Duplicate join returns DataProcessResult.success (idempotent), not failure. ALREADY_MEMBER covers both ACTIVE and PENDING.
blockConditions: ALREADY_MEMBER not checked for both ACTIVE and PENDING status
passConditions: SETNX on composite key membership:{userId}:{groupId}
duplicate returns DataProcessResult.success with alreadyMember:true
ALREADY_MEMBER check covers both ACTIVE and PENDING
resolution: T102 SETNX on composite key membership:{userId}:{groupId}. Duplicate = success (alreadyMember:true). Returning failure on duplicate = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T105 TierContentSelector must apply content_access_level IN accessLevels[] at the query layer (BuildSearchFilter), not post-filter in application code. Application-layer post-filtering retrieves all content including higher-tier docs.
blockConditions: T105 retrieves all content and filters by tier in application code post-fetch
content_access_level filter absent from searchDocuments call
passConditions: content_access_level IN accessLevels[] applied in BuildSearchFilter at query layer
application code never receives higher-tier content to discard
resolution: T105 searchDocuments must include content_access_level in filter. Application code must never receive higher-tier content to discard. Absent query-layer filter = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T99 JoinRequestValidator must return distinct error codes: GROUP_NOT_FOUND, USER_BANNED, ALREADY_MEMBER, INVALID_INVITE_TOKEN. VALIDATION_FAILURE must never be returned — it collapses all error paths.
blockConditions: VALIDATION_FAILURE returned instead of specific error code
error codes collapsed to generic VALIDATION_FAILURE response
passConditions: T99 returns exactly one of: GROUP_NOT_FOUND, USER_BANNED, ALREADY_MEMBER, INVALID_INVITE_TOKEN
ALREADY_MEMBER checks both ACTIVE and PENDING status
resolution: T99 must return exactly one of: GROUP_NOT_FOUND, USER_BANNED, ALREADY_MEMBER, INVALID_INVITE_TOKEN. VALIDATION_FAILURE = BUILD_FAILURE. ALREADY_MEMBER must check both ACTIVE and PENDING status.

description: T114 (ApprovalResultHandler) and T117 (AccessControlUpdater) must use conditional update, not SETNX. SETNX prevents idempotent re-approval of ACTIVE records and idempotent tier re-application.
blockConditions: SETNX used for T114 approval result handler
SETNX used for T117 tier change handler preventing idempotent re-application
passConditions: T114 conditional update: WHERE status=PENDING
T117 conditional update: WHERE current_tier=oldTier
neither T114 nor T117 uses SETNX
resolution: T114 update condition: WHERE status=PENDING. T117 update condition: WHERE current_tier=oldTier. Neither uses SETNX. SETNX on approval/tier-update = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T102 must read group.type from xiigen-groups. PRIVATE group: membership status=PENDING, emit MembershipPending. MembershipActivated must NOT be emitted for private groups without approval.
blockConditions: MembershipActivated emitted for PRIVATE group without approval
group.type read from request payload instead of database
passConditions: T102 reads group.type from DB (not request)
PRIVATE group: status=PENDING emit MembershipPending
PUBLIC group: status=ACTIVE emit MembershipActivated
resolution: T102 reads group.type from DB (not request). PRIVATE: status=PENDING, emit MembershipPending. PUBLIC: status=ACTIVE, emit MembershipActivated. MembershipActivated for PRIVATE group = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: Membership records knowledgeScope=PRIVATE (per-user per-group). Feed records PRIVATE. Approval records PRIVATE. Tier change records PRIVATE. T105 reads GLOBAL content index (intentional â€” published group content). T100 reads GLOBAL subscriptions (intentional â€” written by FLOW-02). PRIVATE records must never be stored as GLOBAL.
blockConditions: PENDING approval record stored as GLOBAL
tenantId absent from any stored record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
T105 content query result stored with wrong scope
passConditions: All membership, feed, approval, and tier change records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE'
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId (AsyncLocalStorage) in all T99-T118 services
No cross-tenant reads or writes in membership, feed, approval, or tier change indexes
